Interface TransformOp

All Known Implementing Classes:
TransformOp.MulOp2D, TransformOp.RotateOp2D, TransformOp.ScaleOp2D, TransformOp.TranslateOp2D
public sealed interface TransformOp permits TransformOp.MulOp2D, TransformOp.RotateOp2D, TransformOp.ScaleOp2D, TransformOp.TranslateOp2D
A transform operation to apply to a matrix.

Transform operations are value-based types; treat equal instances as interchangeable and don't use them wherever an identity is required (e.g. synchronization, Reference API).

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    static final record 
    TransformOp.MulOp2D
    Multiply by the specified transform matrix.
    static final record 
    TransformOp.RotateOp2D
    Rotate by the specified degrees.
    static final record 
    TransformOp.ScaleOp2D
    Scale by the specified delta.
    static final record 
    TransformOp.TranslateOp2D
    Translate by the specified delta.

    Method
    Description
    default void
    apply(AffineTransform affine)
    Applies this transform operation to the given AffineTransform instance.

    apply(org.joml.Matrix4f dest)
    Applies this transform operation to the given matrix.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      void apply(org.joml.Matrix4f dest)
      Applies this transform operation to the given matrix.
      Parameters:
      dest - the destination matrix

    • apply

      default void apply(AffineTransform affine)
      Applies this transform operation to the given AffineTransform instance.
      Parameters:
      affine - the destination object
      Throws:
      UnsupportedOperationException - if this transform is not applicable (e.g. 3D transform (affine transforms are 2D))
